name: io.github.getgapup/gapup-mcp
description: Gapup MCP — 183 agent-payable tools (100+ C-suite expertises: competitive intel, SEC filing decoder, sanctions screener multi-jurisdiction, KYC, pentest scope estimator, attack surface monitor, clinical evidence briefer GRADE-graded, real estate deal screener EU-first moat, industry classifier NAICS/SIC/NACE/GICS/ISIC/HS, research paper Q&A evidence-grounded, sentiment news pulse, infra blueprint designer, AI Act/GDPR/ESRS compliance audits, trade intelligence, content data layer). Pay-per-call via x402 (USDC + EURC on Base + Optimism). Free tier 100 calls/mo, no credit card. Dual-audience format (human / agent — Cerebras-backed agent mode <30s p99).

env.name: GAPUP_API_KEY
env.description: Free tier 100 calls/mo. Get key at https://hub.gapup.io/agents-api/onboard

env.name: GAPUP_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Override Gapup API endpoint. Default: https://hub.gapup.io
